text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Two loops. NPD sample loop: factory requests RM + artwork samples, supplier sends, factory + marketing review, approve into flow or rework. Artwork: a reorder of unchanged artwork takes the last-approved-artwork shortcut and prints directly. Customer-supplied artwork is forwarded to the supplier

to print directly. Own-brand artwork is submitted as a proof (1-up / 2-up / 10-up) and reviewed in PARALLEL by factory + marketing (marketing only if the product is new), quality (English + structure), and a language reviewer (Arabic). Only when all engaged reviewers approve does it print; any
corrections collate into one revised-proof loop. Approved artwork is stored as last-approved for future reorders.
